source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM




THE FULL STACK ENGINEER ROLE.

As a Full Stack Engineer, you’ll build end-to-end features across our customer-facing platform, internal tools, and APIs. You’ll work on everything from detection result dashboards and workflows to backend services that power real-time inference—owning projects from design through production.This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy broad technical ownership and building products that directly impact customers. Responsibilities include:

 - Design and implement end-to-end product features across frontend, backend, and infrastructure.

 - Build scalable APIs and backend services that power real-time deepfake detection.

 - Create intuitive, high-performance UIs that make complex AI outputs understandable and actionable.

 - Collaborate closely with ML engineers, product managers, and designers.

 - Own technical decisions and contribute to system architecture.

 - Improve performance, reliability, and security across the stack.

 - Mentor other engineers and help define engineering best practices.


WHO YOU ARE.

 - 3+ years of professional software engineering experience.

 - Strong experience on both:
   
   - Frontend: React + TypeScript (or similar modern frameworks)
   
   - Backend: Python, Go, or Node.js

 - Experience designing and consuming REST or streaming APIs.

 - Solid understanding of databases, caching, and distributed systems fundamentals.

 - Experience deploying and operating services in cloud environments (AWS/Azure).

 - Strong product mindset and ability to work independently in fast-moving teams.


WHAT WE OFFER.

Reality Defender offers the following benefits to all our employees, regardless of location:

 - Healthcare plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and partial coverage available for dependents

 - Dental and Vision plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and their dependents

 - Short/Long-term disability and life insurance plans with 100% premium coverage for employees

 - FSA/HSA and 401k programs

 - Equity compensation

 - 20 days of PTO per year

 - 12 weeks of Parental Leave

 - Learning and Development budget

 - Monthly wellness benefits

 - Annual company-sponsored offsite

For employees working from Reality Defender’s HQ in NYC, we offer the following benefits:

 - Daily in-office lunch through UberEats

 - Commuter benefits

 - Remote Fridays

 - Happy Hours and other local events

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM




THE ENTERPRISE ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE ROLE.

We are seeking a highly experienced Enterprise Account Executive to drive strategic sales across regulated industries and organizations with significant compliance, fraud prevention, and security requirements. This individual will lead complex enterprise sales cycles at the enterprise level, helping customers address emerging risks related to deepfake impersonation, identity fraud, and AI-enabled social engineering.

This role requires a consultative seller with strong experience navigating complex buying processes, engaging senior stakeholders, and delivering cybersecurity or enterprise technology solutions that address mission-critical security and compliance challenges. Responsibilities include:

 - Own and drive the full enterprise sales cycle, from prospecting through contract execution, deployment, and expansion

 - Identify, develop, and close new business opportunities within financial services, government, insurance, and other regulated or high-compliance industries

 - Build trusted relationships with senior stakeholders, including CISOs, fraud leaders, risk and compliance teams, and executive decision-makers

 - Lead complex sales processes involving technical validation, security and compliance reviews, procurement, and legal negotiations

 - Partner closely with Solutions Engineering, Product, Marketing, and Customer Success teams to deliver effective customer engagements and successful implementations


WHO YOU ARE.

 - 5+ years of enterprise sales experience selling cybersecurity, SaaS, AI, or enterprise technology solutions

 - Proven track record of closing complex, high-value enterprise deals with organizations operating in regulated or high-compliance environments such as financial services, government, insurance, and call centers

 - Experience selling to senior security, risk, fraud, or IT stakeholders

 - Strong executive presence and ability to communicate complex technical solutions to both technical and business audiences

 - Consistent history of meeting or exceeding revenue targets


WHAT WE OFFER.

Reality Defender offers the following benefits to all our employees, regardless of location:

 - Healthcare plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and partial coverage available for dependents

 - Dental and Vision plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and their dependents

 - Short/Long-term disability and life insurance plans with 100% premium coverage for employees

 - FSA/HSA and 401k programs

 - Equity compensation

 - 20 days of PTO per year

 - 12 weeks of Parental Leave

 - Learning and Development budget

 - Monthly wellness benefits

 - Annual company-sponsored offsite

For employees working from Reality Defender’s HQ in NYC, we offer the following benefits:

 - Daily in-office lunch through UberEats

 - Commuter benefits

 - Remote Fridays

 - Happy Hours and other local events

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM




THE PRODUCT MARKETING ROLE.

As a Product Marketer, you’ll shape how enterprise customers understand, evaluate, and adopt Reality Defender’s deepfake detection solutions. You’ll own go-to-market strategy and messaging across our platform, helping position our products for security leaders, fraud teams, and government stakeholders.

This role is ideal for marketers who enjoy translating complex AI and cybersecurity technologies into compelling stories that drive awareness, pipeline, and customer adoption. Responsibilities include:

 - Define and execute go-to-market strategies for new products, features, and integrations.

 - Develop and maintain product positioning, messaging, and competitive differentiation throughout enablement materials for Reality Defender’s sales and customer success teams and our channel partners

 - Collaborate with sales, customer success, and product teams to create sales enablement materials, including pitch decks, datasheets, and FAQs.

 - Conduct market research to understand customer needs, industry trends, and competitive landscape.

 - Lead the creation of compelling case studies, use cases, and customer stories.

 - Partner with demand generation and content teams to build campaigns that drive product adoption and customer engagement.

 - Track and measure the success of product launches and marketing initiatives.


WHO YOU ARE.

 - 5+ years of experience in product marketing for enterprise B2B SaaS, preferably in cybersecurity or API-based solutions.

 - Strong understanding of technical audiences, including IT decision-makers, developers, and security teams.

 - Proven ability to create clear, compelling messaging for technical products.

 - Experience conducting market and competitive analysis.

 - Exceptional collaboration skills with the ability to work across sales, product, and customer success teams.

 - Prior experience in early-stage or fast-growth environments is highly preferred.

 - Based in the United States, with a preference for candidates near New York City.


WHAT WE OFFER.

Reality Defender offers the following benefits to all our employees, regardless of location:

 - Healthcare plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and partial coverage available for dependents

 - Dental and Vision plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and their dependents

 - Short/Long-term disability and life insurance plans with 100% premium coverage for employees

 - FSA/HSA and 401k programs

 - Equity compensation

 - 20 days of PTO per year

 - 12 weeks of Parental Leave

 - Learning and Development budget

 - Monthly wellness benefits

 - Annual company-sponsored offsite

For employees working from Reality Defender’s HQ in NYC, we offer the following benefits:

 - Daily in-office lunch through UberEats

 - Commuter benefits

 - Remote Fridays

 - Happy Hours and other local events

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Enterprise Integrations
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM




THE SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER, ENTERPRISE INTEGRATIONS ROLE.

Reality Defender is seeking a Senior Software Engineer, Enterprise Integrations to join our Engineering team. This engineer will play a key role in designing, building, and supporting the integrations that connect Reality Defender’s platform with enterprise communications systems, telephony providers, and customer environments.

You’ll work on backend services, APIs, and real-time integrations that enable customers to deploy Reality Defender into mission-critical workflows. You’ll collaborate closely with Product, Solutions Engineering, Customer Success, and enterprise customers to deliver secure, scalable, and reliable solutions.

This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys solving challenging integration problems, working directly with customers, and building software that delivers immediate business impact.




WHAT YOU'LL DO...

 - Design, build, and maintain enterprise integrations that enable real-time voice and communications workflows

 - Develop backend services and APIs that integrate Reality Defender’s platform with enterprise customer environments

 - Build and maintain REST APIs, webhooks, and event-driven services

 - Work directly with enterprise customers and internal teams to implement and support complex technical integrations

 - Collaborate with Product, Solutions Engineering, and Customer Success to translate customer requirements into scalable technical solutions

 - Troubleshoot production issues, identify root causes, and implement long-term improvements

 - Improve the scalability, reliability, observability, and performance of integration services

 - Write automated tests and contribute to CI/CD pipelines and engineering best practices

 - Participate in architecture discussions, design reviews, and code reviews

 - Help shape the future of Reality Defender’s enterprise integration platform


QUALIFICATIONS.

 - 3–6 years of professional software engineering experience

 - Strong professional experience developing production applications in Python

 - Experience designing, building, and consuming RESTful APIs

 - Experience building distributed or event-driven systems

 - Experience working with AWS or another major cloud platform

 - Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 - Comfortable collaborating with engineering teams, customer-facing teams, and enterprise customers


NICE TO HAVE.

 - Experience with Go (Golang)

 - Experience with TypeScript

 - Experience building modern web applications using React

 - Experience with SIP, VoIP, or telecommunications technologies

 - Experience integrating with telephony or contact center platforms such as Twilio, Genesys, Amazon Connect, Cisco, RingCentral, Five9, or Zoom Phone

 - Familiarity with WebRTC, RTP, or other real-time communications technologies

 - Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and containerized applications

 - Experience with messaging systems such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, or NATS

 - Experience working

source_jobs.title: Sales Enablement Content Strategist
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM


THE ROLE: SALES ENABLEMENT CONTENT STRATEGIST

Reality Defender is looking for a content-first storyteller to own sales enablement content - translating our evolving product and the fast-moving deepfake threat landscape into the materials our sales and customer success teams use every day to win and retain enterprise, financial services, and government customers. This is a writing- and content-heavy role and you'll work closely with Product to understand what's shipping and why, and turn that into sharp, credible content that connects the evolving threat landscape to what Reality Defender actually does about it. For the right person, this role has a clear path to grow into a broader product marketing strategist position as the team scales. Responsibilities include:

 - Own the creation of sales enablement content: pitch decks, datasheets, FAQs, competitive battlecards, and objection-handling guides.

 - Partner closely with Product to understand new features and releases, and translate them into clear, compelling content tied to the evolving deepfake and AI-fraud threat landscape.

 - Write and maintain product positioning and messaging for security leaders, fraud teams, and government stakeholders.

 - Develop compelling case studies, use cases, and customer stories.

 - Work with sales and product teams to gather field feedback and continuously sharpen enablement materials.

 - Partner with demand generation and content teams on campaigns that reinforce core product positioning.

 - Conduct light market and competitive research to keep messaging sharp and current.


WHO YOU ARE.

 - 3-5 years of experience in content marketing, sales enablement, or product marketing - ideally in B2B SaaS, cybersecurity, or another technical space.

 - An excellent writer first and foremost, with a track record of turning technical, fast-changing product features into clear, persuasive content.

 - Comfortable digging into technical detail and translating it for a range of audiences, from security engineers to executive buyers.

 - Highly collaborative - you will work with product, sales, and customer success on a daily basis.

 - Strong product marketing/ go-to-market instincts are a plus, and a path to grow into that scope over time.

 - Prior experience at an early stage or fast-growth startup is a plus.




WHAT WE OFFER.

Reality Defender offers the following benefits to all our employees, regardless of location:

 - Healthcare plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and partial coverage available for dependents

 - Dental and Vision plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and their dependents

 - Short/Long-term disability and life insurance plans with 100% premium coverage for employees

 - FSA/HSA and 401k programs

 - Equity compensation

 - 20 days of PTO per year

 - 12 weeks of Parental Leave

 - Learning and Development budget

 - Monthly wellness benefits

 - Annual company-sponsored offsite



For employees working from Reality Defender’s HQ in NYC, we offer the following benefits:

 - Daily in-office lunch through U

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE.

Reality Defender is an award-winning cybersecurity company helping enterprises and governments detect deepfakes and AI-generated media. Utilizing a patented multi-model approach, Reality Defender is robust against the bleeding edge of generative platforms producing video, audio, imagery, and text media. Reality Defender's API-first deepfake detection platform empowers teams and developers alike to identify fraud, disinformation campaigns, and harmful deepfakes in real time.

Backed by world class investors including DCVC, Illuminate Financial, Y Combinator, Booz Allen Hamilton, IBM, Accenture, Rackhouse, and Argon VC, Reality Defender works with leading enterprise clients, financial institutions, and governments in order to ensure AI-generated media is not used for malicious purposes.

Youtube: Reality Defender Wins RSA Most Innovative Startup https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TKOZmwyNUNM


CUSTOMER SUPPORT ENGINEER ROLE.

As a Customer Support Engineer, you'll be the primary technical point of contact for our enterprise, financial services, and government customers as they integrate and run Reality Defender's deepfake detection platform day to day. This role combines practical technical troubleshooting with customer success responsibilities: you will resolve issues while also building relationships and increasing account visibility to ensure our customers remain successful and continue to renew.

This role is based in Europe, supporting customers across European time zones alongside our existing US-based team.

Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

 - Serve as the primary point of contact for enterprise customers' day-to-day technical questions, troubleshooting, and API integration issues.

 - Own support tickets end-to-end: triage, diagnose, escalate to engineering when needed, and follow through until resolved.

 - Support onboarding and implementation for new customers, including API setup, configuration, and integration testing.

 - Partner with customer success and sales to monitor account health, flag risk early, and bring technical credibility to renewal and expansion conversations.

 - Build and maintain internal documentation, FAQs, and troubleshooting runbooks to reduce repeat tickets and speed up resolution.

 - Relay recurring customer feedback and technical pain points to product and engineering to inform the roadmap.

 - Track support metrics (response time, resolution time, CSAT) and flag trends that need attention.


WHO YOU ARE.

 - 2-4 years of experience in customer support, technical support, or customer success at a B2B SaaS or API-based company.

 - Comfortable with technical troubleshooting (APIs, integrations, logs) as well as owning the relationship side of an account.

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills, able to translate technical detail for both engineers and business stakeholders.

 - Experience supporting enterprise, financial services, or public sector customers is a plus.

 - Based in Europe, able to support customers across European business hours.


WHAT WE OFFER.

Reality Defender offers the following benefits to all our employees, regardless of location:

 - Healthcare plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and partial coverage available for dependents

 - Dental and Vision plans with 100% premium coverage for employees and their dependents

 - Short/Long-term disability and life insurance plans with 100% premium coverage for employees

 - FSA/HSA and 401k programs

 - Equity compensation

 - 20 days of PTO per year

 - 12 weeks of Parental Leave

 - Learning and Development budget

 - Monthly wellness benefits

 - Annual company-sponsored offsite

notes: Cybersecurity company with a strong engineering focus, backed by prominent investors.
